calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Defendant and Moving Party Janet Tapia appearing on her own behalf.

Defendant Janet Tapia's Motion to Set Aside Judgment entered on 7/30/2013 and to Quash Writ of Possession heard this day. Order shortening time for Motion was signed by the court on August 6, 2013.
Proof of Service of Motion on file.

Defendant Janet Tapia sworn and examined on her own behalf.

Court ordered Motion to Set Aside Judgment Granted. Court ordered Writ of Execution for Possession of Real Property quashed.
Court Ordered Plaintiff to file a Motion to re-set this matter for Trial in Department 501. Clerk to give notice of Order.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Continued To Jul-29-13 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 206

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 206 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S.Vantree, CSR: Vicki Gross # 5525
Plaintiff Lydia Gamboa appears in pro per.
No appearance by Defendant Janet Tapia.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff Lydia Gamboaand against defendant Janet Tapia.
The court cancels the oral agreement between the parties. Plaintiff to take possession of the upstairs front bedroom on the left located at 583 Maple Street, San Francisco, CA 94112.

Damages $670.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $30.00
for a Total Judgment of $700.00
The plaintiff is to go to the Access Center for assistance with preparing a judgment and submitting it to the court for signing.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Harry Dorfman; Clerk: N. Bautista; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Lidia Gamboa is in Propera Persona.
Defendant Janet Tapia is present.
Attorney Timothy Haas appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept 504A , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JUL-29-2013 remains on calendar. (D501/JPT)
